title: acronychia simplicifolia
intro: Acronychia simplicifolia, also known as the New Zealand tea tree or coastal acronychia, is a plant species native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating skin issues and wounds. The health benefits of Acronychia simplicifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
